name: ui-web-system
description: Image-guided brand kit, component library, and page-build workflows for websites

interface.shortDescription: Image-guided brand kits, component systems, and page-build workflows
interface.longDescription: Create website brand kits, reusable component libraries, and implemented pages through an image_gen-first contract-driven workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use UI Web System to create a website brand kit, component library, or page using image_gen first and then implement the approved direction in code
